title: Elaphoglossum heterolepis
intro: Elaphoglossum heterolepis, commonly known as the varipinnate chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of Elaphoglossum heterolepis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other polyphenolic compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties. Elaphoglossum heterolepis is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease and oxidative stress-related disorders.
